title: Viewer demo recording uses scripted product story
summary: The Kage viewer demo should be scripted before recording. The current storyboard is documented in docs/VIEWER DEMO SCRIPT.md and the renderer injects captions/highlights into the deployed GitHub Pages viewer while record
body:
The Kage viewer demo should be scripted before recording. The current storyboard is documented in docs/VIEWER_DEMO_SCRIPT.md and the renderer injects captions/highlights into the deployed GitHub Pages viewer while recording a wide 1600x900 MP4. The story is: inspect repo memory, show graph scale, click memory, search runbook, separate memory/code views, search tests, end with the hive loop.
Evidence: scripts/render-viewer-demo.mjs was rerendered successfully and produced docs/assets/kage-viewer-demo.mp4 plus docs/assets/kage-viewer-demo-poster.png.
